title: Authorization of Use
description: Official management decision to authorize use of an information system based on an authorization package and accepted risk to operations, assets, and reputation.

definitions.definition: Official management decision to authorize use of an information system based on an authorization package and accepted risk to operations, assets, and reputation.
definitions.sources:
- [NIST SP 800-37 Rev. 2](https://doi.org/10.6028/NIST.SP.800-37r2)
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
